title: Dashboard
dashboardDescription: Monitor incoming complaints, review flagged evidence, and keep your field team aligned from one place.
newEntriesLastHour: 12 new entries in the last hour
legalDashboardDescription: Cases awaiting legal review, flagged evidence, and legal team updates can be monitored here.
legalLibraryDescription: Search by meaning, not just keywords — describe the offence or paste a section reference and we'll rank the closest matches, including old/new act cross-references.
legalSearchPlaceholder: e.g. cheating by impersonation, dowry death, BNS 103...
browseHint: Try a scenario, an offence, or a section number — at least 2 characters.
